perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Non-live-action 2D animation begins with two male characters (A-Chu and a friend) talking against a light blue grid background; A-Chu is bald and wearing a black tank top. (2) Scene transitions to A-Chu looking at his smartphone with a frustrated expression, followed by multiple character cuts showing different social interactions and internal thoughts represented by 'angel' and 'devil' versions of himself appearing as small sprites. (3) A-Chu is seen in a bedroom setting, lying on a bed and tossing and turning restlessly, expressing distress through wide eyes and frantic movements before a final title card appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic pop BGM starts immediately with a high-pitched, energetic male vocal narration in Traditional Chinese. (2) Dialogue between male characters occurs, interspersed with sound effects like phone notification 'pings', comic 'boing' sounds for transitions, and character-specific vocal exclamations. (3) The BGM tempo remains consistent but becomes slightly more subdued during an internal monologue phase, then finishes with a sharp comedic sound effect and a short musical sting at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White subtitles with black outlines in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative Text: The title '阿啾小劇場' (A-Chu Mini Theater) is static at the top center. (3) Hook Text: Captions like '對室友吃醋ㄉ阿啾' (A-Chu being jealous of his roommate) and '完整影片在Youtube' (Full video on YouTube) appear in a bottom banner to provide context and call-to-action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a structure of Intro -> Social Situation Setup -> Internal Monologue/Conflict -> Comedic Climax.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: The video is an animation; no real humans are present. 1 main animated character (A-Chu) and 2 secondary animated characters.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald male cartoon character wearing a black tank top with highly expressive facial features.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Stylized 2D backgrounds including a light blue grid, a simple indoor room with a phone interface overlay, and a dark bedroom with a bed and pillows.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Narrative Conflict -> Psychological Internal Monologue -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous animated vlog format to recount a personal story about the protagonist's feelings of jealousy when his roommate spends significant time with a shared senior friend. It explores the psychological nuance of feeling 'left out' through exaggerated visual metaphors (angel/devil) and fast-paced comedic timing.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature bald character design (A-Chu) and characteristic high-pitched, rapid-fire storytelling style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the creator's established character IP and relatable social scenarios to drive engagement.
